title: Autotask PSA Integration?
excerpt:

posts.author: bglick (Bradley Glick)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are an MSP and use both monday.com and Autotask PSA. Our technicians primarily use Autotask so we are looking for ways to integrate the two. I have done some automation experimentation, but only rudimentary.

Has anyone integrated the two or know if it’s possible using a service like Make.

Our goal is to trim down on duplicate entries in tools. If a technician is working through steps in a project board in monday.com, it would be awesome if their time spent on the step, as well as notes, could populate to an already established ticket within Autotask.

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @bglick ,

Welcome to the monday community!

There is no native Autotask PSA integration with Make.com, but it could be possible to “connect” monday and Autotask PSA.

Looking through the relevant documentation, I would suggest sending an email at developers@datto.com explaining what you want to achieve.

If it is possible and should you require any professional assistance, we have a team with great experience in creating custom complicated make integrations and we would be happy to help. You can find us at info@thespelas.com .

Hope this helps!
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
